div.span:
app_users
Clerk identity → app identity,
role, profile, deactivation

JSON content: credential_versions stores the whole
Section → Subsection → Unit tree (content_document) and
server-only answers (grading_document) as JSONB.

Object storage: file bytes live in a provider (local today,
Backblaze B2 later). PostgreSQL stores only logical object keys.
No assets table; no absolute paths.
